questionHtml:
What is the volume, in cm3, of the final solution if 100 cm3 of a solution containing 1.42 g of sodium sulfate, Na2SO4, is diluted to the concentration of 0.020 mol dm–3?

Mr(Na2SO4) = 142

A.     50

B.     400

C.     500

D.     600
